evidence.API_evidence: CashPro APIs documented with multiple families: Account Information, Payments, Check Services, etc. API library shows 84 total APIs across 10 families. Documentation mentions 'Initiate, cancel, and request the status of different payment types, in real-time'
evidence.SDK_evidence: No SDKs found. Only mentions CashPro Validator tool and API integrations with third-party systems
evidence.AI_evidence: No AI models, agents, or AI-specific features documented
evidence.language_evidence: All content appears in English only. No language switcher or multi-language content found

coding_notes: REGISTRATION platform with comprehensive API documentation behind sign-up. BUG=1 for CashPro Validator tool that validates payment files. ROLE=1 due to registration requirement and different API access levels. DATA=1 due to comprehensive Digital Privacy Notice. OPEN=1 because registration appears to be free self-service ('Sign up for access'). Social media links found in footer (YouTube, LinkedIn). No GitHub repositories or SDKs documented.
